title: practical english usage - Part 6

To  find This overview gives a general picture of the topics covered in the book; it is not Contents      overview Contents overview •  xiv 103   -ing forms after nouns and adjectives: tired of listening 102  infinitives after nouns and pronouns: my decision to leave 101   infinitives after adjectives: pleased to see you 100  -ing forms after verbs: I enjoy travelling.

98  verb + object + infinitive: I want you to listen.  99 try and ..., go and ..., etc 97  infinitives after verbs: It's beginning to rain.
